category_sources: source_facts.description identifies VictoriaLogs as an open source user-friendly database for logs from VictoriaMetrics.
display_name_sources: source_facts.description names the VictoriaMetrics logs database; source_facts.homepage uses the official VictoriaLogs documentation path.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official VictoriaMetrics documentation page dedicated to VictoriaLogs.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already provides https://github.com/VictoriaMetrics/VictoriaLogs, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description states database for logs from VictoriaMetrics; source_facts.executables lists victoria-logs.
